data_description.type: Choose 'BLE' for direct Bluetooth control, or 'LAN' for local Wi-Fi control.

data_description.address: The Bluetooth address of the Govee device discovered nearby.
data_description.model: Model number printed on the device label, e.g. H617C or H6076B.

lan.title: Govee LAN (Wi-Fi)
lan.description: Found {discovered} device(s) on your local network. Select one, or enter an IP address and model manually.

data_description.lan_device_key: Select a Govee device discovered on your local network via the LAN API.
data_description.lan_ip: IP address of the Govee device (only needed if it was not auto-discovered).
data_description.lan_sku: Model number printed on the device label, e.g. H6199 or H6076B. Required for manual IP entry.

data_description.model: Model number printed on the device label, e.g. H617C or H6076B.

abort.no_devices_found: No devices found on the network

ble_needs_pairing.title: Govee {model} needs re-pairing
ble_needs_pairing.description: The device at {address} is reachable over Bluetooth but is not exposing its control service. It was likely factory-reset. Re-onboard it in the Govee Home app, then it will reconnect automatically.

lan_not_responding.title: Govee {sku} is not answering LAN API requests
lan_not_responding.description: The device at {ip} is on the network but does not answer status requests. Make sure the LAN API is enabled for this device in the Govee Home app (Device settings → LAN Control).
